name: Image Quality Gate
description: HelixQA bank covering the cover-image quality gate + replacement cascade across platforms. Validates X-Cover-Quality / X-Cover-Source response headers, placeholder fallback behavior, LLM-resolver opt-in safety, and that no visibly blurry cover reaches any client.

test_cases.name: X-Cover-Quality header present on every cover response
test_cases.expected_result: Every cover response carries a quality header so clients can distinguish pass from placeholder

test_cases.name: Placeholder SVG valid for every media type

steps.name: Request placeholder for each supported type
steps.action: GET /api/v1/cover/placeholder/:type for movie, tv_show, music_album, book, game, software, comic
steps.expected: Each response is a well-formed SVG document (<svg element present)

test_cases.expected_result: All 7 media types have renderable placeholder SVGs

test_cases.name: LLM image-search resolver disabled by default

steps.name: Fetch covers across 20 entities
steps.expected: No X-Cover-Source header equals 'llm_image_search' unless operator has explicitly set CATALOGIZER_LLM_IMAGE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true

test_cases.expected_result: LLM fallback never activates without explicit opt-in

test_cases.name: Quality verdict persisted across repeated requests

steps.name: Request cover for entity 1
steps.expected: Both responses return the same X-Cover-Quality and X-Cover-Source headers

steps.name: Confirm no new row added to image_quality_assessments between calls
steps.expected: attempt_count does not increase between successive requests served from cache

test_cases.expected_result: Cache hit on second request skips re-assessment

test_cases.name: Web cover grid shows no visibly blurry covers after sync

steps.name: Log in to the web app as admin
Wait for the cover grid to populate
Screenshot the grid and run frame-level quality check
steps.expected: No cover scores below the movie_poster blur threshold

test_cases.expected_result: Zero visibly blurry covers surface in the web cover grid

test_cases.name: Placeholder SVG renders in place of missing covers

steps.name: Navigate to an entity with no cover assigned

test_cases.expected_result: Missing covers fall back to the placeholder asset, not a broken image

test_cases.name: Android TV channel covers pass the gate

steps.name: Launch the app and browse 'Catalogizer Picks'
steps.action: adb shell am start + DPAD navigate
steps.expected: Channel populated with at least 10 covers

steps.name: Sample 10 covers via screencap and assess quality
steps.expected: Every sampled cover passes the tv_poster threshold

test_cases.expected_result: No visibly blurry cover appears in the TV channel

test_cases.name: Watch Next row shows high-quality art

steps.name: Seed partially-watched items via API
steps.action: API calls to mark 3 items in-progress
steps.expected: Items appear in the system Watch Next row

steps.name: Screenshot the Watch Next row and assess quality
steps.action: screencap of homescreen row + Laplacian variance
steps.expected: Every watch-next card passes the tv_poster threshold

test_cases.expected_result: Watch Next row covers are crisp and correctly sized

test_cases.name: Android phone browse grid: no blurry covers

steps.name: Install and launch the Android app

test_cases.expected_result: Phone client shows only high-quality covers

test_cases.name: Tauri desktop app shows only quality-gated covers
test_cases.expected_result: Desktop app surfaces only covers that passed the gate

test_cases.name: SSRF guard rejects private-range URLs returned by the LLM orchestrator

steps.name: Stand up an LLM orchestrator mock that returns url=http://127.0.0.1/evil.jpg
steps.action: Start stub HTTP server that responds with {"url":"http://127.0.0.1/evil.jpg"}

steps.name: Set CATALOGIZER_LLM_IMAGE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true + endpoint=stub url
steps.action: Configure env and trigger a cover fetch that falls through to LLM
steps.expected: API refuses the SSRF URL and reports it in logs

test_cases.expected_result: Loopback, private, and link-local URLs are blocked before download

test_cases.name: Revalidation touches last_checked_at for stale rows

steps.name: Backdate one row in image_quality_assessments to 30 days ago
steps.action: SQL update on (entity_type, entity_id, variant)=(movie, 1, primary)

steps.name: Wait for the revalidator tick (or trigger it via admin endpoint)
steps.expected: Row's last_checked_at is now within the last minute

test_cases.expected_result: Background revalidation refreshes stale rows without operator intervention
